title: Include information about item on the sub-item summary
excerpt:
When I click on a subitem that’s displayed in My Work / My Week, it doesn’t show me which item the subitem relates to. See the screenshot below for an example.

posts.author: TheOtherPM (Paul McGregor)
posts.cookedHtml:
When I click on a subitem that’s displayed in My Work / My Week, it doesn’t show me which item the subitem relates to. See the screenshot below for an example.

So, in this case, I have no idea which of the 40 potential podcast episodes this refers to. The Item Card view also doesn’t display this information.

A solution might be for the group to be called the name of the item rather than just “Subitems”.

image2213×1277 163 KB

posts.author: mondayuser5 (Sam)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree. It’s actually quite absurd this is not already the default. Having the group listed as subitems doesn’t seem to be helpful in any situation.
